sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id UInt32, vector Array(Float64));
UPDATE test_vectors SET vector = [7.0, 8.0, 9.0] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, L2SquaredNorm(vector) AS squared_norm FROM test_vectors;
SELECT id, vector, L2SquaredNorm(vector) AS squared_norm FROM test_vectors WHERE L2SquaredNorm(vector) > 20;
